Find a working selector path or interaction sequence, then return a reusable script patch that preserves the script-first runtime.

output.diagnosis: Added a robust, script-first handler to automatically traverse hh.ru questionnaires/tests that appear after opening a vacancy, preserving the script-first runtime by delegating questionnaire handling to a dedicated modular utility and integrating it into the apply_batch flow without replacing existing logic.
output.patch_summary: Introduce a reusable handleQuestionnaire(page) utility and integrate it into the apply_batch flow. Add regression tests to verify correct behavior when a questionnaire is presented and when no questionnaire is present.
output.test_text:
import pytest
from unittest.mock import Mock

class MockLocator:
    def __init__(self, visible=True):
        self._visible = visible
        self.click_called = False
    async def is_visible(self):
        return self._visible
    async def click(self):
        self.click_called = True

class MockPage:
    def __init__(self, vis_map):
        self._vis_map = vis_map
    def locator(self, selector):
        visible = self._vis_map.get(selector, False)
        return MockLocator(visible)
    async def waitForNavigation(self, **kwargs):
        pass

async def test_handle_questionnaire_success():
    # First selector (Начать анкету) is visible
    vis = {
        'button:has-text("Начать анкету")': True,
        'button:has-text("Пройти анкету")': False,
        'button:has-text("Начать тест")': False,
        'button:has-text("Пройти тест")': False,
    }
    page = MockPage(vis)
    from repairers.hh_questionnaire import handleQuestionnaire
    assert await handleQuestionnaire(page) == True

async def test_handle_questionnaire_none_visible():
    vis = {
        'button:has-text("Начать анкету")': False,
        'button:has-text("Пройти анкету")': False,
        'button:has-text("Начать тест")': False,
        'button:has-text("Пройти тест")': False,
    }
    page = MockPage(vis)
    from repairers.hh_questionnaire import handleQuestionnaire
    assert await handleQuestionnaire(page) == False

*** End Patch
